title: trifolium subterraneum subsp. subterraneum
intro: Trifolium subterraneum subsp. subterraneum, also known as small or early yellow clover, is a subspecies of the clover plant that belongs to the pea family. It has been found to possess medicinal properties due to its high concentration of isoflavones, which have been linked to various health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats, as well as to support cardiovascular health and bone density. Trifolium subterraneum subsp. subterraneum can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, or used in combination with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
